features.description: AWS HealthLake: SigV4-authenticated FHIR R4 client skeleton
Datavant: tokenization/linkage REST client skeleton
TriNetX: OAuth2 client and study feasibility query path
N3C: enclave API session and code-submission stub
PCORnet: CDM v7 federated query distribution stub
Mayo MCP: OMOP workspace provisioning and query stub
Azure HDS: Azure AD / managed identity FHIR client skeleton
NIH All of Us: workbench API cohort query stub
Base connector: enforce authenticate(), health_check(), ingest() contract
Connector registry: map platform slug to instance + metadata
Load and validate config/connectors.yaml at startup
GET /connectors returns id, display name, phase, integration mode
GET /health aggregate (all connectors summary)
GET /health/aws — AWS HealthLake-specific probe
GET /health/datavant — Datavant-specific probe
GET /health/trinetx — TriNetX-specific probe
GET /health/n3c — N3C-specific probe
GET /health/pcornet — PCORnet-specific probe
GET /health/mayo — Mayo MCP-specific probe
GET /health/azure — Azure HDS-specific probe
GET /health/all_of_us — All of Us-specific probe
POST /ingest/{platform} with validated JSON body and correlation ID
POST /ingest/batch/{platform} for chunked ingestion
Per-connector rate limit tracking (in-memory) per spec quotas
Circuit breaker state per connector for failing upstreams
Retry policy with jitter for idempotent connector calls
Structured logging: structlog JSON, phi_safe=true, no raw payloads
HTTP middleware: X-Correlation-Id propagation
Global exception handler returning safe error envelopes
medinovai-secrets-manager-bridge integration for credentials
Credential rotation hooks per connector (reload secret refs)
Forward normalized ingest events to medinovai-integration-gateway
CloudEvents envelope builder for integration record ingested
FHIR R4 Bundle structural validation pre-ingest (HealthLake, Azure)
HL7v2 passthrough flag (gateway compatibility)
mTLS client option for EPG-adjacent deployments
Register service with medinovai-registry on startup
GET /ready checks config loaded and registry reachable (optional)
OpenAPI: document all connector routes and security schemes
Prometheus /metrics endpoint for scrape (optional)
Unit tests: connector interface compliance per platform
Integration tests: sandbox health for E1 connectors
Playwright or httpx E2E: full register→auth→ingest happy path
Audit trail: emit audit events for ingest attempts (IDs only)
Tenant isolation: require tenant_id on ingest when gateway present
Datavant: match vs create token policy switch
TriNetX: token refresh before cohort count calls
N3C: 2FA session renewal handling
PCORnet: VPN health indicator in health_check payload
Mayo MCP: workspace id scoping on ingest metadata
Azure HDS: DICOM retrieve path stub alongside FHIR
All of Us: controlled tier access gate in authenticate()
Docker image: non-root user, healthcheck, Python 3.11-slim
docker-compose: INTEGRATION_GATEWAY_URL + shared network documentation
K8s manifest template: probes, REGISTRY_URL, resources
